description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish and olive drab green accents on the grip, stock, and magazine. The rifle features a fixed stock, a prominent pistol grip, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. It is equipped with a drum magazine, suggesting a high ammunition capacity, and has a long, standard barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle. The top of the receiver is fitted with iron sights, and the overall design is robust, likely constructed from steel and polymer components. The rifle's form and features indicate it is designed for sustained fire and urban combat scenarios.
description: A tactical rifle with a fixed stock, drum magazine, vertical foregrip, and iron sights, finished in black and olive drab.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the vertical alignment of the foregrip and drum magazine.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fixed stock, pistol grip, drum magazine, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the iron sights and magazine.
